title: galium anglicum subsp. parisiense
intro: Galium anglicum subsp. parisiense, also known as English bedstraw, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bedstraw family (Galium). It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues, as it has astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Galium anglicum subsp. parisiense include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Galium anglicum subsp. parisiense can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat conditions such as diarrhea, dysentery, and other gastrointestinal complaints.
